programme.title: Hunt for the Wilderpeople
programme.desc: A defiant foster kid and his grumpy foster dad set out on an adventure through the wild New Zealand bush. On the run from the law and child services, the pair hilariously search for a way to survive.

programme.title: Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: A homesteading family in 1867 Wyoming faces a crisis when the husband is killed and the wife must decide whether to remain or take her son and daughter back East.

programme.title: Handcrafted America
programme.desc: Handcrafted America - Metal Spurs, Hiking Boots, Backpacks: Host Jill Wagner travels the country on a quest to find talented craftsmen who still make incredible items by hand. In Llano, Texas, Jill spends time with Charles Wendt, a metal worker who recruits her how to help make a custom pair of traditional cowboy spurs. In Felton, California, Jill steps into complete comfort when she meets Kevin Leahy who makes custom hiking boots that perfectly fit each customer's foot. Finally, in Portland, Oregon, Jill meets the Martinez family from Mexico that makes functional as well as fashionable canvas and leather backpacks from all-American materials.

programme.title: Wild West Chronicles
programme.desc: Wild West Chronicles - The Four Dead in Five Seconds Gunfight: After two Mexican vaqueros cross the border in search of their stolen cattle, they are gunned down by the rustlers. When El Paso's newly appointed marshal arrests local ranch hands for the murders, he sparks one of the West's most infamous gunfights.

programme.title: Wild West Chronicles
programme.desc: Wild West Chronicles - The Gold Rush Detectives: When gold goes missing from a safe in a remote mining town, Wells Fargo sends detectives Henry Johnson and Isaiah Lees to hunt down the culprits. Though the two men couldn't be more different, they must learn to work together to crack the case.

programme.title: Into The Wild Frontier
programme.desc: Into The Wild Frontier - Joe Walker: Humble Hero: Joe Walker doesn't head west to seek fame and fortune, but his trailblazing explorations across the uncharted frontier usher in a golden age of expansion and settlement that help create the United States as we know them today.

programme.title: Handcrafted America
programme.desc: Handcrafted America - Spear Guns, Wood and Tile Cabinets, and Pewter Goblets: Host Jill Wagner travels the country on a quest to find talented craftsmen who still make incredible items by hand. In Riviera Beach, Florida, John Ippolito shows Jill how he makes the spear guns that are changing the sport of spearfishing with their amazing accuracy. Then in Las Vegas, Nevada, Jamie Ann Yocono makes beautifully crafted wood and tile cabinets and proves woodworking is not just a job for men. Finally, in Templeton, California, Randy Stromsoe, a classically trained, award-winning metal smith demonstrates how he makes the one of a kind pewter goblets that have been used by U.S. Presidents.

programme.title: State Plate
programme.desc: State Plate - Alaska: In this episode of State Plate, Taylor treks through the Last Frontier to show you how to eat like an Alaskan. He'll travel to our northern-most state to bring you delicacies not found anywhere else in the nation. First, he'll check out a hot dog that looks familiar but hides a tasty secret. Then, he'll fish the Alaskan waters for two different types of kings. Finally, he'll learn the lore behind two Alaskan eats: pickled kelp and Eskimo ice cream. If you crave adventure and hunger for the unknown, join Taylor on his tasty exploration of this wild land.

programme.title: Cowboy Way
programme.desc: The Cowboy Way - Let It Ripp: The cowboys are busy processing cattle and preparing for an important shipment when a chute gets stuck, bringing work to a halt and risking time and money they can't afford to lose. Booger trains a cutting horse and enters it into its first competition. Cody organizes a campout for the youth at the Alabama Sheriff's Boys Ranch, and the guys share some of their cowboy wisdom with the hope of inspiring another generation to follow the cowboy way. Friends and family gather for a baby shower, where Bubba and Kaley reveal the name they've chosen for their new addition.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: Wagon Train - The Nels Stack Story: Nels Stack, a war veteran, joins the wagon train. He is now a pacifist who defends against any prejudice. Stack's mild manner leads others to label him a coward. But the tides turn when his kindness gets the train out of dangerous Indian territory.

programme.desc: Heath Daughtry—VP of Sales for Yellowfin Yachts, founder of the Florida Skiff Challenge, and the reason his gym keeps 90-pound dumbbells on the rack. If Heath is doing anything, it's going to be at full throttle. Heath lives his life by three words: time, energy, effort. The concept is simple, if he's going to be a part of something, he's going to give it everything he has. There's simply no quit in him. From his passion to protect our waters, to his dedication to his family, he'll never stop committing 110% to the efforts that he believes in. programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.sub-title: Baby's First Moves: Get Up and Go
programme.desc: Within the first year of babies' lives, their physical development begins to kick into high gear as they explore ways to physically interact with the world around them. BABY'S FIRST MOVES is a joyful celebration of their movement milestones -- including first steps, clapping, jumping, dancing and more.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Isn't the world exciting?! Learn about things found in nature like flowers, grass, trees, and leaves with real-life footage and narration. Sing-along to popular nursery rhymes and learn about common bedtime themes. Teach baby how to say words like eat, milk, and all done verbally and through sign language. Discover words and activities about playtime and friendship.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: From the moment babies are born, they use their developing senses to discover the world. In terms of sight, bold patterns in contrasting colors or black and white are initially preferred. As for sounds, Mother s gentle voice, in any language, is music to baby's ears. Language Nursery: Voices From Many Lands acquaints your baby with the sounds of foreign language by presenting delightful, visually stimulating images accompanied by spoken passages, natural sounds and music.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Join our playful puppet host, Bard the Dragon, on a fun-filled adventure using everyday words such as flower, cat, and moon, and beautiful scenery from nature. World Of Words lets you and your little one share the excitement of discovering new words together!

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Early on in babies' development, they begin to recognize primary colors such as blue, red, and yellow. And all the while, they're also processing an infinite variety of new sights and sounds. Think of the joy you'll experience as you introduce your little one to beautiful music and imagery with Baby Beethoven Symphony of Fun.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.sub-title: Baby Da Vinci: From Head to Toe
programme.desc: From the day their eyes open, babies begin to observe new things around the world and about themselves. Baby Da Vinci From Head to Toe presents them with a playful and interactive introduction to the human body in three languages -- English, Spanish, and French. With a whimsical blend of adorable puppets, real children and animals and famous works of art, this captivating program also features upbeat classical music.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Meet fascinating creatures from across the globe and learn to run, hop, and crawl like your favorite animal friends. Dance and sing along to discover animal names and the native habitats of the world's most unique creatures. See real-life images of lions and zebras on the African savannah, then learn animal names through repetition and narration, or simply watch your favorite animals play!

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Babies love animals, and now you can bring animals from the seven continents home to your baby. Meet dozens of exotic animals including Asian pandas, Australian kangaroos and Arctic snow monkeys...all filmed in their beautiful, natural habitats. Rhythms and songs inspired by faraway lands have been orchestrated especially for little ears and encourage your baby to sing, dance and play to the world beats. You'll laugh together at the funny puppet shows featuring moms and their baby animals.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: As little ones become better acquainted with the world, they grow curious about animals of all kinds, beyond just the family pet. And as their communication skills continue to develop, they enjoy imitating animal sounds as well. Baby Noah Animal Expedition takes your little explorer across the globe to meet animals -- two-by-two -- from the savannah, the rainforest and tropics, the Outback, the ocean and the Polar Regions.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: World Music introduces you and your little one to beautiful sounds from every continent, bringing a fresh, new experience of music and culture. Sing, dance and play to exotic rhythms that open the door to an appreciation of different cultures from around the world.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Learn about the numbers 1,2,3,4 & 5 through rhyme, real-life footage, counting, stories, and repetition - accompanied by classical music and real world imagery.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: It's time again for the Dance-Off between the Big Bitty City Dance Team and the Berry Bitty City Dancers. Plum is stressed out and frazzled because she desperately wants to win. And the Big Bitty City Dancers are a force to be reckoned with. They are elegant and beautifully synchronized. Plum shows the girls a maze of dance steps that she's choreographed in the hopes of creating a winning piece. The problem is, the contest is only 1 week away!

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: While sipping cider in Strawberry's café, the girls muse about how they cannot wait for winter to arrive. They list the various traditions they love about the season but the one they all agree on is the Glimmerberry Ball. Strawberry mentions that she doesn't think the café can hold the party this year because of how the town has grown. The girls decide to split up and search for a new location.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Lemon is ecstatic. She races out of her salon and goes around to the other girls' houses proclaiming that she "did it!" and beckoning them to join her. They follow her back and are completely dazzled by her newest creation - Glamicures. They are brightly colored, jeweled manicures with tiny microchips inside that play songs when the wearer moves her hand. Each girl lines up to receive her new glamicure and soon there is a cacophony of color and sound.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: While working in her store, Orange overhears the Berrykins laughing and shouting outside. When she goes to the door to investigate, a clump of dandelion fluff gets blown inside chased by three Berrykins. She watches as they head butt the clump around until it floats back toward Orange. Just as it floats close, she gives it a bat sending it outside and the Berrykins happily chasing after it. Wanting in on the fun, she joins them.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: With all the Baby Berrykins running around Berry Bitty City, Princess Berrykin decides to build a Day Care Center and playground. But she's worried because it's dull-looking - all grey metal and brown wood. She asks Strawberry whom might be good to help her out. And two names immediately come to her mind - Lemon and Raspberry! The Princess confesses she's always admired their sense of design and style.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Finding she has some free time one morning, Strawberry visits Berrykin Bloom who is filled with excitement over his new crop of Berry Bitty fruits and vegetables his garden has never grown so much produce! He can't wait to share his new crop (the perfect bitty size) with Berry Bitty City, so Strawberry volunteers to help him transport the produce to Orange's General Store.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Strawberry is really touched when her girlfriends and the Berrykins volunteer to help her with the construction of her new marketplace, so when the girls suggest they take charge of designing Strawberry's dream-bedroom to go on the second story, of course Strawberry agrees. While construction is going on, the girls each show Strawberry their individual ideas for the bedroom.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: With time running out before the Grand Opening celebration for the new Marketplace, Strawberry's friends get the idea to invite her favorite singer, superstar CHERRY JAM, to be the guest singer. The girls are blown away when their berryjuice cell phone gets a text message that Cherry accepts their invitation! Strawberry is touched by their surprise, but reminds them that now the town and Marketplace really have to shine!

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Cherry Jam is so enjoying staying in Berry Bitty City, that she calls her managers in Big Bitty City and informs them that she is going to stay for a much needed vacation! Strawberry and the girls are thrilled that she will be with them for a little longer, and they do all they can to make their guest comfortable. But Cherry doesn't want to be treated like a guest she wants to fit in and contribute to the community.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Berry Bitty City is holding its first city-wide talent show! Hearing that it's the music students of superstar Cherry Jam, a talent scout from Big Bitty City plans to show up. Strawberry and her friends excitedly anticipate her arrival.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: With the summer almost over, Blueberry overhears Strawberry talking about a wonderful tropical island and believes her friend is going to surprise them all with a much needed vacation! Blueberry makes the other girls promise to keep the secret until Strawberry reveals the big surprise. Of course, even though they've promised to keep the secret, they can't help but try and suss out what the island's like from every little thing Strawberry does.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: It's the last week of summer and Berry Bitty City is hopping with activity as the girls prepare for their tropical island vacation at Berry Breezy Bay Resort. But just as they're about to leave, bad news: the resort is closed for the season due to berry breezy weather. The girls are disappointed, but Orange isn't giving up. She says if they can't go to the tropical island, maybe they can bring the tropical island here!

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: With only a few days of summer left, the girls are about to enjoy their first vacation in their newly-created, tropical beach resort at Berry Bitty Lake, when who should descend upon them but Mavis Maraschino, the comically over-the-top "Entertainment Tonight"-style show host. Mavis has dumped her focus on fashions in favor of an even glitzier show called Lifestyles of the Berry Big Bitty Stars, and she wants her first segment to be about how pop superstar Cherry Jam spends her vacation.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: On a beautiful winter's night, Blueberry reads the Baby Berrykins a story of what happened one winter in Berry Bitty City-a winter that almost wasn't. Just as everyone is ready for winter fun and fashions, a sudden warming melts the snow and ruins their plans. Improvising with snowmen made of shaved ice and cotton puffs, Strawberry and her friends play "Capture the Snowman's Carrot Nose." The Berrykins want to join in the fun, so the girls play against them, with Strawberry refereeing.

programme.title: A Little Rusty
programme.desc: The Cloud of Monstrox and Jestro unlocks a mysterious Forbidden Power. What kind ofhavoc will they unleash? And can Merlok 2.0 and the NEXO KNIGHTS make the new COMBO NEXO Powers work? The Knights finally make it to the Lava Lands – using their various new forms of transport, which are all strictly civilian vechicles – and they must regroup and learn to fight together again to face the new threat of Jestro, the Cloud of Monstrox, and their STONE MONSTERS (in this case, Stone Gargoyles.) But Jestro and his monsters beat back the knights and recover the STAFF OF MONSTROX – which was buried under the ceremonial chamber from Episode 210 (and is now the Lava Puker amusement park ride) – and they get away on Jestro's EVIL MOBILE, which he recovers from the HQ garage. Macy says this is exactly why she's been touring the kingdom preparing everyone for the next attack. The Knights have to get it together because now the entire kingdom is under threat…again. Robin decides he must upgrade the Knights' vehicles and make them more “fight optimized.” Ava and Merlok 2.0 must figure out how to use new NEXO Powers because regular NEXO Powers do make Stone monsters back into stone, but the Cloud simply zaps them to life again. Meanwhile, in the IRON MOUNTAINS, Jestro and the Cloud of Monstrox find the first of the Forbidden Powers: RELENTLESS RUST. They find the ROGUL STATUE holding the power and zap him to life. Now…they can rust those shiny knights to pieces! Ava and Merlok are attempting to use NEXO COMBO POWERS – with hilarious results – as they try to figure out how they might work. When Jestro attacks, he's able to halt the Fortrex by instantly rusting its tracks and wheels! Robin has his hands full trying to clean all the rust from the attack of Relentless Rust. As the Knights attempt to defend against Jestro, the Cloud is zapping statues to life. He hits a statue with a bolt of lightning as Clay is touching it. Something happens…Clay feels odd stiff as if rock is mixing with his body. Finally, Ava and Merlok 2.0 download to the Knights their new thing: a COMBO NEXO COMBO Power. It works! It can smash the animated statues to dust! They use it to defeat Jestro, but he and the Cloud get away with the Forbidden Power of Relentless Rust. Victory … sort of. Clay talks to Merlok 2.0…something has happened to him. What can they do? Merlok 2.0 is very concerned.

programme.title: The Last Hope
programme.desc: When the Ninjas' attempt to return Garmadon's ‘Helmet of Darkness' to its perch at the Celestial Clock in order to prevent the final battle between Lloyd and his father from beginning fails, a Super Weapon is created that can destroy all of Ninjago. With the Overlord and Garmadon nearing completion of the Super-Weapon, Misako tells the group she thinks there could be one last chance at preventing Lloyd's final battle with his father. She believes if they can steal the helmet off Garmadon's head and return it to it's rightful perch on the Celestial Clock, it could stop the clock before it reaches zero, thus preventing the final battle from beginning. Dressed as Warriors, the Ninja escort their ‘captive' Misako to Garmadon, and the heroes see glimpses of the Super-Weapon being built. In a thrilling escape, Misako cleverly steals Garmadon's helmet, and they race to the Celestial Clock. Lloyd has a brief encounter with his father, and hesitates striking him. When they return the helmet to its rightful perch, they're one second too late, allowing the clock to reach zero, and for it to focus a beam of concentrated light from the sky into the Super-Weapon. Nya is taken hostage, as the others fall off a cliff, barely surviving the fall. The Ninja have failed -- the final battle has begun.

programme.title: Thunderstox
programme.desc: Jestro and the Cloud of Monstrox encounters the sculptor. He helps unleash a horde of fierce garden gnomes on Knighton. What will the NEXO KNIGHTS do against this new enemy? Will their new COMBO NEXO Powers do the trick? As Jestro and the Cloud of Monstrox head off on the Evil Mobile to 'store' the Forbidden Power in a secret location, they encounter…THE SCULPTOR. His real name is ROBERTO ARNOLDI. He's a sensitive and odd artist who has been laid off by the king (the King ordered a "smashing" statue of the Queen, and the Sculptor made a statue of the Queen literally smashing monsters. He takes everything very literally.) Jestro instructs him to make a "bad" statue that he can use to attack the knights. The Sculptor sets to work. Meanwhile, the NEXO KNIGHTS are discussing the COMBO NEXO Powers, the Forbidden Powers, and what all this means. Lance, meanwhile, decides that since his talk show career is on hold, he thinks he'll install cameras in the Fortrex and do a Big Brother-like expose show on the Knights (he decides NOT to tell the others.) Merlok 2.0 and the Cloud of Monstrox (each talking to their cohorts) explain the history of the Forbidden Powers: it's a history lesson about the WIZARDS' COUNCIL, the Forbidden Powers, and how they were stopped long ago. This visual montage leads Jestro to…MOUNT THUNDERSTROX. The Cloud of Monstrox shows him the circle of ten Standing Stones where he will insert the Forbidden Powers. "What'll happen after that?” asks Jestro, curious. "Oh, I don't want to spoil the surprise," says the Cloud. They insert the first Forbidden Power, Relentless Rust, and it locks into place on its stone. They go off to battle the Knights and collect the "bad" statue the sculptor is making. But he's made a literally bad statue…it's terrible ... garden gnomes. Like an amateur art student. And…it's not even finished. ("You can't rush bad genius!") The Knights attack with their newly modified vehicles and they succeed in destroying the Evil Mobile. They then try to use a COMBO NEXO Power, but can't…it had to be perfect to work (Ava and Merlok need to work on it.) As Jestro and the Cloud retreat, Merlok again talks to Clay about turning to stone! Merlok calls in Robin…he will need him to build something to help Clay as he becomes more and more impaired.

programme.title: Return Of The Overlord
programme.desc: When Garmadon uses his new Super-Weapon to turn Jamakai Village evil, he unwittingly unsettles the balance, allowing the spirit of the Overlord to cross over and possesses his body. Lord Garmadon witnesses the Super-Weapon come to life, revealing it to be ‘Garma-Tron', a giant moving cannon. His first test subject is Nya. Meanwhile, the heroes prepare for the final battle and sneak-attack Garmadon's compound…only to find it empty. The Super-Weapon is moving towards the coastline, where the cannon's range can reach Ninjago. On the way there, the Ninja must face off with Evil Nya, turned dark from the Super-Weapon. On the coastline, Lloyd battles his father atop Garma-Tron. The battle is fierce, but Lloyd fails at stopping his father from firing Garma-Tron, turning Jamanakai Village evil. Garmadon naively celebrates, not realizing he's undone the balance, allowing the spirit of the Overlord to cross over and possess his body. And as the Overlord continues to get more powerful, a hideous metamorphosis is taking place. Lloyd must fight the Overlord, and just when it looks like good will prevail, Lloyd is injured and thrown to the ground. In the end, the villains escape through a portal to Ninjago, and our heroes are abandoned on the island with no way home. And with the Green Ninja injured, it looks like all is lost. Evil has won.

programme.title: Rotten Luck
programme.desc: Jestro and the Cloud of Monstrox unleashes the Forbidden Power Ravaging Rot on Knighton! Turning everything into green gooey rot. But Robin has an awesome new invention that could help the NEXO KNIGHTS Jestro and the Cloud of Monstrox find a second Forbidden Power near the falling down Swamp Castle: RAVAGING ROT. With this power, they can make everything in the kingdom rot – food, vegetation, anything that grows or is natural. And that's exactly what they do! It's awful and makes everything stink. The Sculptor start to sculpt a portable HeadQuarter for his master, Jestro. Jestro expects it to be done when they return from ravaging the land. Axl is very concerned – he's into organic food ... and now food starts to rot. Merlok 2.0 and Ava are continuing to work on perfecting the COMBO NEXO Powers. We see display screens of MANY of the NEXO Powers. But there's a huge power consumption issue with these new-fangled combos. “I'll have to find an algorithmic power curve consumption solution, magic man,” says Ava. “I always just sort of choose them by, uh, feel.” “What do you feel like?” “Uh, a ham sandwich, a banana, and dragon fire,” responds Merlok. “That produced a combo with 2% efficiency,” says Ava. “This is why we have to actually THINK about and study perfec Combos. We need automatic power integration.” The Knights must stop Jestro from rotting all the food and living plant matter in Knighton and Axl leads the charge. But as they finally confront Jestro, who's trying to rot a field of beans near Fruitbridge, they're hit by his finally completed ROLLING HQ (the Sculptor is proud of the “artsy” elements.) … it's not exactly perfect though … he took the idea of Head Quarter a little too litteral and created a big head. Finally, in this conclusive battle where the knights get strapped on a rotting bridge, Clay emerges in a sleek, new BATTLE SUIT that Robin built for him because he was starting to have trouble moving around (the whole turning to stone thing.) It's smaller and more high-tech than the bigger Mechs of the past. Clay's able to drive Jestro off. Jestro, at the end of the episode, puts the Forbidden Power of Ravaging Rot into Mount Thunderstrox. Meanwhile, back at the Fortrex, Axl makes an organic food feast for all his fellow Knights.

programme.title: Rise Of The Snakes
programme.desc: The four Ninja are snapped out of their post-hero complacency when Lord Garmadon's young son Lloyd shows up and tries to pick up where his father left off. The Ninja dismiss him as a threat, but regret that choice after Lloyd wakes up the evil snake tribe. A prophecy is revealed that states a green ninja will ultimately defeat Lord Garmadon.

programme.title: The Book Of Monsters, Part 1
programme.desc: When Jestro the Jester finds the Book of Monsters, chaos breaks loose in the Kingdom of Knighton. Can the newly graduated Knights from the Knights' Academy save the kingdom? It's final graduation fighting exams for the latest Knights from Knights' Academy. All our new Knights demonstrate their prowess: CLAY, AARON, AXL and LANCE. PRINCESS MACY get to join them, but her father doesn't want her to graduate. As part of the entertainment, MERLOK does an amazing magic trick. His act is followed by…JESTRO, the King's Jester. He's terrible (and he should know to never follow a better act.) Everyone laughed because he's a real joke....a total failure. While Jestro roams the halls fo the King's Castle, forlorn, he hears the BOOK OF MONSTERS calling to him from Merlok's library. The book talks Jestro into gathering as many books of spells as he can carry, but they're interrupted by...Clay! As Jestro quickly pages through the Book of Monsters to attack Clay, Merlok arrives. There's a battle in the library between Jestro and Merlok. Finally, the wizard summons up his most powerful spell in self-defence. BOOM! There's a big, magical explosion and when Clay forces his way back into the library, Merlok, Jestro and the magic books are...GONE!

programme.title: New Girl in Town
programme.desc: When the World Petacular comes to Heartlake City and is almost ruined before it's even started, five feisty girls unite, despite their differences, using their creativity to save the day. Best friends Olivia, Andrea, Emma, Mia and Stephanie reside in HeartLake City but didn't know each other - that is until the World Petacular brought them together! On the eve of the biggest event Heartlake City hosts, disaster and chaos is abound. New-in-town Olivia is helping her veterinarian Aunt Sophie with her mobile clinic. But when she's put in charge of training a scruffy puppy named Scarlet, the puppy runs amuck, leaving a trail of destruction as she collides with Andrea, ruins Emma's banner and Stephanie's cakes, and finally spooks Mia's horse Bella who bucks Mia off and sprints away. The girls quickly unite, helping each-other to save the day and most importantly have fun along the way!

programme.title: Home
programme.desc: Back in training mode with the looming threat of Lloyd and the Hypnobrai, Zane wanders after a Falcon and lands himself in a heap of trouble. The rest of the Ninja leave the training dojo to help him and return to find that the snakes have burned it to the ground.

programme.title: The Book Of Monsters, Part 2
programme.desc: Realizing they must defend the Kingdom from Jestro's monsters, the Knights try to organize but are despondent when they discover their best advisor – Merlok the Magician – has sacrificed himself to save them. When Jestro awakens, he's been blasted miles and miles away from the King's Castle by Merlok's explosive spell. And, it seems, all the books he was trying to steal have been scattered, too. The Book of Monsters broke Jestro' fall and now he can use the book to attack the people who laughed at him. Meanwhile, the King and his newly-trained Knights pick through the rubble of Merlok's library. They'll have to figure something out, because Jestro and his newly made magic monsters attack King's Castle! Clay organizes the Knights to defend the kingdom, but they've never worked together before. It takes all their training, plus the help of an old friend…MERLOK! Only now he's MERLOK 2.0. Ava has been piecing together what happened and discovering that the “ghost in the machine” she's been chasing is really Merlok in digital form. Now, he can use his magic digitally and he downloads just the right weapons to the struggling Knights! They finally foil Jestro's attack with Merlok's help and officially become NEXO KNIGHTS!

programme.title: Stephanie's Surprise Party
programme.desc: When Emma, Olivia, Andrea and Mia plan a surprise party for Stephanie's birthday, they soon discover that it's not easy keeping their plans secret from Stephanie who becomes suspicious when none of the girls have time to hang out. When Emma, Olivia, Andrea and Mia plan a surprise party for Stephanie's birthday, they discover that it's not easy keeping their plans a secret. As the girls choreograph a dance routine, magic show and search for the perfect present and cake, Stephanie becomes aware that her friends are avoiding her on her birthday and excluding her from their activities... Little does she know that her friends are secretly preparing a surprise pool party for her! Once the surprise is revealed Stephanie realises how much her friends care about her and the importance of friendship.

programme.title: Snakebit
programme.desc: Lloyd, having been kicked out of the Hynobrai snake tribe unlocks a second tribe – The Fangpyres – to help him regain control. The Ninja are busy setting up their new HQ that Zane discovered, but are called to duty when the Fangpyres attack the village where Jay's family lives.

programme.title: The Power Of Merlok
programme.desc: When Jestro attacks a village on the far side of the Kingdom, the NEXO-Knights wonder how they'll get there. Then Macy remembers her dad has a royal RV…maybe they can “mod” that for their own, “knightly” use? Now the NEXO-Knights get rolling…in THE FORTREX, their own ROLLING CASTLE! This great new HQ, which houses Merlok 2.0 as an operating system, will be how the knights move around Knighton and protect it from Jestro and his monsters. Speaking of the evil jester, in this episode Jestro uses some newly-made monsters to attack a town far from the capitol where he thinks he's safe from the Knights' reach. We see two parallel stories here: the Knights training, learning more about digital magic and getting organized as a team and at the same time we see Jestro making monsters, trying to learn how his powers work and talking to the Book. In the end, the Knights roll up in their castle and defeat Jestro and his marauding monsters. Lance thinks he should be the leader because he's a snot. “Of course I'm the leader…I'm a Richmond.”

programme.title: Dolphin Cruise
programme.desc: Olivia, Stephanie, Andrea, Mia and Emma enter a science contest at school and win a trip on a luxury yacht but not everything goes as planned when they set out to sea. When Olivia, Stephanie, Andrea, Mia and Emma enter a school science contest and win a Dolphin sight-seeing trip, not everything goes to plan...As the girls set out to sea on a luxury yacht, misunderstandings and disagreements occur which become secondary when they discover a pod of dolphins in danger. The girls learn that they have to compromise and trust in each other if they are to save the dolphins and their trip out to sea...

programme.title: Never Trust A Snake
programme.desc: After the Fangpyres join forces with the Hypnobrai, Lloyd awakens Pythor – the last remaining snake of the Anacondrai tribe. Pythor lures Lloyd under his spell and steals a map from him that will show him where the remaining two snakes tribes dwell and Uncle Sensei saves Lloyd from doom.

programme.title: The Knights Code
programme.desc: Jestro uses the Book of Chaos to unleash, um, chaos and attack the King's hover train to try and kidnap the royal party. Can the NEXO-Knights bring order out of the chaos and save the King? Jestro finds the Book of Chaos in the countryside and decides he must feed it to the book. The Book of Monsters actually tells Jestro NOT to feed it to him he tells Jestro he's not ready for that kind of power. But Jestro doesn't listen. Now the Book unleashes chaotic monsters and Jestro uses them to attack the King and his party who are on a business-related tour of the kingdom. When the NEXO-Knights show up to stop the monster attacks and realize that they must save King and Queen Halbert – Macy's parents – from the chaotic evil monsters that have been unleashed. Clay asserts himself as leader and brings order to the knights from the chaos. He has his own book: the Book of the Knight's Code. They should all live by it.

programme.title: Country Girls
programme.desc: When the girls go to Mia's grandparents' ranch and Olivia accidentally knocks down the neighbor's barn, the girls promise to raise money to rebuild it and now have to learn to set aside their differences and work together to make good on their promise. Mia invites her friends to her grandparents' ranch for the weekend. But when Olivia accidentally knocks down a neighbor's barn with a tractor, the girls promise to raise the money to rebuild it themselves. Complicating matters, Mia and Stephanie turn out to like the same boy, Martin. They'll have to learn to set aside their differences and work together if they're going to raise enough money to make good on their promise.

programme.title: Leonardo
programme.desc: Leonardo Lorenzo tells his friends they are too common for an exclusive party at the Medici Palace.

programme.title: Leonardo
programme.desc: Leonardo Lorenzo falls in love with a commoner, and Leo and Mac break into the Medici Palace.

programme.title: Mr Bloom's Nursery
programme.desc: Mr Bloom's Nursery Mr Bloom and the Tiddlers wake up some seeds by planting them.

programme.title: Mr Bloom's Nursery
programme.desc: Mr Bloom's Nursery Margaret dreams of being a Space Cabbage so the Tiddlers create star pictures and planets.

programme.title: Mr Bloom's Nursery
programme.desc: Mr Bloom's Nursery There is a lot of work to do, especially as there's a huge turnip that needs pulling up.

programme.title: Mr Bloom's Nursery
programme.desc: Mr Bloom's Nursery Mr Bloom and the Tiddlers pot some plants up as they've grown too big.

programme.title: Mr Bloom's Nursery
programme.desc: Mr Bloom's Nursery The Tiddlers harvest vegetables to help Mr Bloom with his prize-winning displays.

programme.title: Mr Bloom's Nursery
programme.desc: Mr Bloom's Nursery The Veggies have a Games Day to show off their different skills.

programme.title: Mr Bloom's Nursery
programme.desc: Mr Bloom's Nursery The Tiddlers and Mr Bloom hunt for potatoes - eventually finding them underground.

programme.title: Mr Bloom's Nursery
programme.desc: Mr Bloom's Nursery Mr Bloom and the Tiddlers give the plants a drink, but there's not enough water.

programme.title: Mr Bloom's Nursery
programme.desc: Mr Bloom's Nursery The Tiddlers find a lettuce which is poorly because it's being eaten by greenfly.

programme.title: Mr Bloom's Nursery
programme.desc: Mr Bloom's Nursery Raymond tries to go on the seesaw but finds he is too big and sends Colin flying.

programme.title: Mr Bloom's Nursery
programme.desc: Mr Bloom's Nursery Mr Bloom and the Tiddlers discover that it takes time for vegetables to grow.

programme.title: Mr Bloom's Nursery
programme.desc: Mr Bloom's Nursery The Tiddlers collect the snails which have been nibbling the lettuces, but they escape!

programme.title: Mr Bloom's Nursery
programme.desc: Mr Bloom's Nursery Mr Bloom puts on a shadow puppet show to try and rid Margaret of her fear of shadows.

programme.title: Mr Bloom's Nursery
programme.desc: Mr Bloom's Nursery The gang practice a nursery rhyme and make music from bits and bobs they find.

programme.title: Mr Bloom's Nursery
programme.desc: Mr Bloom's Nursery Joan's leafy hair is so long that Mr Bloom has to give the reluctant fennel a trim.

programme.title: The Princess and the Dragon
programme.desc: When a 7 year old princess gets transported to a magical world where she befriends a Dragon, she sets to find out a secret mirror that can help her reconnect with her mother.

programme.title: Rabbit School
programme.desc: A rabbit gets lost in a strange land where he'll need to learn the secrets of Easter magic to save the Rabbit School from being taken over by a gang of evil foxes.

programme.title: Blippi Visits Kennedy Space Center
programme.desc: Blippi takes a trip to the Kennedy Space Center, immersing himself in the fascinating world of space exploration and gaining knowledge about the vast expanse beyond our planet!

programme.title: The Berry Bitty Great Race
programme.desc: Apple isn't paying attention when Strawberry describes their campout tradition of telling "Tall Tales." So Apple tells her thrilling adventure of a wild road rally she entered, only to surprise the girls by proving the story is actually true.

programme.title: The Berry Best Taste Test
programme.desc: Apple's rave review on her berryweb page of Strawberry's new dessert starts a booming mail order dessert business for Berry Bitty City. When Strawberry's stuffed-up nose makes her bake a bad-tasting cake, Apple, afraid the truth will hurt Strawberry's reputation, proclaims it's delicious. The fib snowballs when the Queen of Berryvania reads Apple's review and orders Strawberry's new cake for her ball. A madcap chase ensues as Apple tries to stop the airmail postal bees from delivering the cake.

programme.title: Foods that Smell
programme.desc: Lily and Avery follow their noses to find out what gives foods their amazing aromas. Avery enjoys a super garlicky Caesar salad, and then tries to sniff out a cure for his ghastly garlic breath. Lily makes a splash at the fish market where she gets to the bottom of seafood's suspicious smells. Together, they take on the ultimate olfactory challenge: recreating Matt's Amazing Seafood Chowder, by sense of smell alone!

programme.title: Foods that Melt
programme.desc: Watch foods melt before your eyes! Chill out as Lily tries to solve the mystery behind Baked Alaska, a frozen dessert that doesn't melt in the oven. Onthe hunt for a simple snack, Avery visits a local cheese shop and discovers there's moreto cheese than just cheddar! Back at the kitchen with Matt, Lily and Avery use a varietyof cheeses and fresh veggiesto see who can make thebest twist on an ooey-gooey melted favourite: grilled cheese sandwiches!

programme.title: Neutralized
programme.desc: Without his Cyberse cards, Yusaku can only barely hold back Revolver's relentless attack. Summoning his new ace monster, Revolver recounts the origin of Ai and his mission to wipe out all Cyberse from the world.

programme.title: Link the Circuit
programme.desc: Yusaku and Revolver keep fighting using the strength of their ace monsters. Despite the odds against him, Yusaku recounts the incident that brought him to this point and steadies his resolve.

programme.title: KidCity
programme.desc: Play along with the KidCity family —Little Flash, Ava, DadCity, and MomCity— in all their kid-friendly games!

programme.title: Onyx Family
programme.desc: Onyx Family is best known for their spooky skits, starring the Onyx Kids: Shiloh, Shasha, Sinead, and Shalom.

programme.title: Challenge Squad
programme.desc: Challenge Squad takes on the most epic challenges, featuring your favorite YouTube stars!

programme.title: EvanTubeHD
programme.desc: Share in the fun with YouTube star EvanTubeHD, his sister JillianTubeHD, and the whole Tube Family!

programme.title: HobbyKidsTV
programme.desc: Come along for the fun with popular YouTube family, HobbyKidsTV! Plus, HobbyKids Adventures!

programme.title: EvanTubeHD
programme.desc: Share in the fun with YouTube star EvanTubeHD, his sister JillianTubeHD, and the whole Tube Family!

programme.title: HobbyKidsTV
programme.desc: Come along for the fun with popular YouTube family, HobbyKidsTV! Plus, HobbyKids Adventures!

programme.title: Fishtronaut
programme.desc: The series tells the story of Fishtronaut, a fish in a spacesuit, similar to reverse scuba gear, which allows him to fly and breathe out of water.

programme.title: JKrew
programme.desc: JKrew is a vlogging family that also loves to do challenges and skits. Be part of our Krew:)!

programme.title: The Sand Warrior
programme.desc: The race to end all races is on - and the prize is gravity itself. It's Matt, Roxie & Gomez vs the revved up speed demon known as Cyber Racer and his mean machine the Dune Basher. Ready, get set - go!

programme.title: Gummy Bear and Friends
programme.desc: Follow the silly adventures of everyone's favorite singing and dancing animated gummy bear and his friends Kala the Cat and Harry the Chameleon

programme.title: Cat & Keet
programme.desc: Cat and Keet is the classic chase comedy with the unscrupulous Cat on one side and the very resourceful parrot Keet on the other side.

programme.title: Chai Chai
programme.desc: When the cafe owner, waiter guard dog and naughty food loving monkey comes together, it becomes chaotic. A chase comedy for all ages.

programme.title: Darwin & Newts
programme.desc: Darwin & Newts are two siblings who go on fantastic escapades, discovering and experimenting with early science and engineering principles, all the while exploring the natural wonders of the outside world.

programme.title: OK Gamer Kids Vs Pros
programme.desc: Super Girl Kels takes a break from her busy tournament schedule to face off and show off!

programme.title: LEGO Set Builds Ninjago: Mountain Shrine / Kai's Ninja Ambush / Jay & Skull Motorbike / Ice Dragon / Spinjitzu Dojo / Garmadon's Dark Fortress
programme.desc: Enjoy this speed build of Lego Ninjago 2254 Mountain Shrine! / Enjoy this speed build of Lego Ninjago 2258 Kai's Ninja Ambush! / Enjoy this speed build of Lego Ninjago 2259 Jay & Skull Motorbike! / Enjoy this speed build of Lego Ninjago 2260 Ice Dragon! / Enjoy this speed build of Lego Ninjago 2504 Spinjitzu Dojo! / Enjoy this speed build of Lego Ninjago 2505 Garmadon's Dark Fortress!

programme.title: T-Rex Ranch
programme.desc: Park ranger Darren spills coffee on his computer and all the park cameras go down, meanwhile, a sneaky intruder gets into the park by using cookies as a distraction!

programme.title: T-Rex Ranch
programme.desc: There is a new addition to the T-Rex Ranch park ranger team, meet Cam! On his first mission, he goes on an adventure with Zoe to find the Peteinosaurus dinosaur!

programme.title: LEGO® DREAMZzz: Trials of The Dream Chasers: The Dream Forge
programme.desc: As the clock runs out to face the Dream Forge, Mateo and his friends enlist the help of the mysterious Dream Bandit and her abilities to manipulate time. Mr. Oz and Albert defend the forge from a grimspawn onslaught while the Dream Chaser hopefuls enter the forge and face their deepest fears. But they must hurry: if the forge is destroyed before they finish, they may never become Dream Chasers!

programme.title: Bratz: North Pole
programme.desc: The Bratz Babyz are back and cuter than ever in this delectably sweet Christmas adventure about the power of friendship and positive attitude! When a trip to the mall with Gran leads to a shocking discovery that Santa won't be able to "deliver" this Christmas, the Bratz Babyz take matters into their own hands and work together to save Christmas!

programme.title: LEGO® DREAMZzz: Trials of The Dream Chasers: The Dream Forge
programme.desc: As the clock runs out to face the Dream Forge, Mateo and his friends enlist the help of the mysterious Dream Bandit and her abilities to manipulate time. Mr. Oz and Albert defend the forge from a grimspawn onslaught while the Dream Chaser hopefuls enter the forge and face their deepest fears. But they must hurry: if the forge is destroyed before they finish, they may never become Dream Chasers!

programme.title: Hero 108
programme.desc: ApeTrully goes in search of vegetables for Big Green but stumbles upon the Groundhogs underground castle and is taken prisoner. First Squad comes to rescue him, but they must first win the challenge

programme.title: Hero 108
programme.sub-title: Pitched Battle of the Air Force
programme.desc: Highroller and his minions attack Big Green, led by an enormous Black Dragon, but First Squad uses Woo's new machine to create their own dragon who manages to fend off the attack.

programme.title: Pet Shop Zombies: Raiders of the Claw Machine / Rock and Wheel
programme.desc: Buzzbee's forgetfulness almost spoils the gang's day at Lethal Land, the world's most dangerous amusement park. But Hildie quickly learns that Buzzbee's absent-minded security measures are more effective than she expected. / Running on the hamster wheel helps Hildie solve problems faster. So, Buzzbee supercharges her wheel until it breaks free of its mounts. The problems literally snowball as Hildie's wheel rolls all over the store.

programme.title: The DaVincibles: It's the Gargoyles
programme.desc: The DaVinci's bring home an abandoned gargoyle statue from Notre Dame Cathedral which gives Pablo the heebie-jeebies! Meanwhile, Quba travels to Paris to Spray Alive the cathedrals gargoyles to carry

programme.title: Jelly Jamm
programme.desc: The King is impatient to try out his new acquisition: a bathtub that flies to music.

programme.title: Jelly Jamm
programme.desc: Bello suddenly hasgreat powers thanks to a sheriff star badge that grants his every wish.

programme.title: Misha the Purple Cat: The Basketball Game / Once Upon a Time
programme.desc: Misha's school has a basketball game scheduled against another school. The kids from there are tall, strong and word has it, are very good players. Misha's team is nervous but they know that no one can compete with Gina Giraffe. Gina, however, breaks a leg and can't play, so they have to find a substitute. / Misha is not feeling well. She has a high fever and a little problem: she doesn't want to take the medicine, because it tastes really bad. Her grandfather brings her a book to read while she rests in bed. As she reads the book, she enters into the story. Suddenly she finds herself in a faraway place and doesn't know how to get home.

programme.title: Rabbids Invasion: Museum Rabbids / Kite Rabbids
programme.desc: Drawing a line on a museum floor, the Rabbids encounter a perfectly straight line that blocks their way. The line marks a space in front of a minimalist painting...

programme.title: Mr. Monkey, Monkey Mechanic: Mr. Giraffe's Car Is Too Small / Mr. Chameleon's Car Needs New Paint / Mrs. Penguin's Ice Cream Truck Is Too Hot
programme.desc: Today, Mr. Giraffe pays a visit to Mr. Monkey, Monkey Mechanic's garage! Ever since he's been driving his car, his neck has been really sore. Mr. Monkey checks his car, and it turns out it's in tiptop shape! But, Mr. Giraffe's neck is not. It hurts! It must have something to do with his car. So, Mr. Monkey comes up with a plan, which of course, involves his trusty monkey wrench! / Mr. Monkey, Monkey Mechanic is so happy to have his friend Mr. Chameleon visit his garage today! Mr. Chamelon has a special talent, his color changes to whatever he color he's wearing. He asks Mr. Monkey to change the color of his favorite shirt, red. Mr. Monkey happily paints the car. As soon as he drives away, Mr. Chameleon is back, wearing another color and wanting another paint job! / It's a sweltering hot day when Mrs. Penguin drops in at Mr. Monkey, Monkey Mechanic's garage with a big problem - the ice cream in her truck is melting! After inspecting the ice cream truck, Mr. Monkey comes up with an idea and puts his trusty monkey wrench to use. But, is the solution cool enough to keep her ice cream cold?

programme.desc: An unusual sound woke Shelley up from her afternoon nap. It turned out to be Greg playing his harmonica! But Shelley also wanted to do some tricks and she with Greg made a real show for Zibidi and Booboo! / On a very hot day Greg felt thirsty, so he went to the kitchen to have some water. But the floor was very hot, it was so hot it burned Greg's feet. So he had to dance across the kitchen to get to the water. / Here comes a new fun cartoon for toddlers! In this episode, we'll see how a small piece of popcorn causes a lot trouble but it all turns out great in the end. One day, a big yummy piece of popcorn fell into Greg's cage. / In this episode, Greg figures out that no matter how annoying your friends might sometimes be, they are still the most important thing a hamster can have. programme.title: Workin' Moms
programme.desc: Kate's in the doghouse with Nathan – and promises to finally find a new nanny in order to make amends. But when Kate can't find the time, she enlists Eleanor's help who pulls in a ringer of her choosing. In bittersweet news, Kate is offered the promotion she and Mo have been competing for, but keeps it a secret from Nathan. Frankie convinces Giselle to join her in therapy with Anne, and they connect in the unlikeliest of ways. Jenny, eager for a night of debauchery, jumps at the chance to help organize a last-minute bachelorette party, inviting Kate, Frankie, and Anne. Their night leaves them all somewhat bewildered and Jenny forever changed.

programme.title: Workin' Moms
programme.desc: Morning fireworks explode when Kate informs Nathan that she accepted the big promotion, which will take her to Montreal for three months. Kate strikes a deal with Sarah her new nanny and older sister. Meanwhile, Anne compensates for her husband's financial troubles by scheduling in as many clients as possible, and unexpectedly places herself in a dangerous situation. Frankie is revisited by postpartum depression, and Jenny secretly seeks Val's lactation expertise when her new nipple piercing interferes with her breastfeeding.

programme.title: Workin' Moms
programme.desc: With little time left to spend with her family before her big new job takes her to Montreal, Kate overcompensates in trying to set them up for her absence – causing her to doubt her choice. Can Kate really let go? Meanwhile, Anne's determination to establish a bond with her daughter Alice, leads her down a reckless path. And Frankie oversteps a boundary during a run-in with an old client at a house showing, and pays a high price.

programme.title: Workin' Moms
programme.desc: Kate is faced with a veritable “Sophie's choice” when her mother Eleanor pressures Kate to put down her longtime pet Olly in favour of protecting Charlie. Meanwhile, a therapy session with Anne leads Frankie to attempt to re-invigorate her marriage, and Anne on the home front finds "Mean Nanny's" friendly rapport with Alice not only annoying, but also surprisingly enviable.

programme.title: Workin' Moms
programme.desc: When Kate is shamed – both in Mommy and Me and at work – for liking submissive animated porn, she's left wondering exactly the same thing as those she confided in: what's wrong with her? At Tech-cellent! Jenny ups her game in attracting Marvin, but is far from prepared when he takes the bait. And Frankie makes a breakthrough in her disconnection issues with Giselle thanks to an unlikely source.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: After Johnny finds a positive pregnancy test in Alexis's garbage, Johnny and Moira consider the potential implications of an unexpected pregnancy, but when Johnny tries to broach the subject with Alexis, she is distracted with her college enrollment application. David and Patrick desperately search for a place to hook up, and are forced to consider Stevie's offer of a private space.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: Moira prepares for her one-woman show “One Crazy Summer: the Patty Hearst Story” at the annual Schitt's Creek Asbestos Fest, but with its intricate and complex dance routine, Moira's worries she won't be able to pull it off. Meanwhile, David basks in the constant flattery from a group of teens that hang around the store, but is livid when Alexis points out it might be a big charade. Johnny looks to hire new help for the motel and Roland claims to have the perfect man for the job.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: Moira chauffeurs Alexis and Twyla on their girls' night out at a bar, doling out unsolicited romantic advice. At the motel Roland builds a man cave in the office instead of doing actual work, forcing Johnny to reconsider Roland's employment. With Stevie's help, Patrick rearranges some products in the store to illustrate David's inability to compromise, and David tries his best to conciliate.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: Moira is horrified to learn there's a rumour of her death circulating online, but when she reads the heartfelt condolences from her former Hollywood co-stars, she starts to relish it. Meanwhile, Roland asks Johnny to be the godfather to Roland and Jocelyn's child, leading Johnny to search for ways to politely decline. David and Alexis go on a buying trip to a local farm, and Alexis soon realizes that she has a connection to the farmer, which puts her in an awkward position.

programme.title: Workin' Moms
programme.desc: Kate joins her team at Gaze on a Saturday to work on a pitch, promising Nathan she'll be home in time for family dinner with their parents. When the camaraderie and joking get out of hand, it's up to Kate to rein things in. With her family balance in jeopardy, she rushes to leave the office. On her way out she learns there's been a decision on the Montreal job, and can think of no better counsel on the matter than her own dad. Anne struggles to find a point of connection with her daughter Alice, and Jenny is faced with disconcerting truths about her life and relationship when Ian asks for her help with his Kickstarter project.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.desc: Richard Sarvate quit his ten year programming career in Silicon Valley to be a stand up comedian. Oops! Now he spends his nights poking fun at tech jobs.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.desc: Iraq War veteran Josh Novey takes the stage with an easy-going presence and jokes about Waffle House, kindly threatening his audience, and tickling grizzly bears.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.desc: Who goes from being a mild-mannered nationally recognized college a Capella group vocal percussionist to becoming a high-energy, intelligent, physical, and downright silly beatboxing comedian? None other than Comedian Tyler Boeh, who shifted his focus from singing a Capella (a word he describes as Latin for “Without Girlfriend”) when he won a comedy contest in Portland Oregon. After winning and placing in the finals of numerous Comedy Competitions from San Francisco to Seattle to Boston to The World Series of Comedy, Boeh not only launched a great career in comedy including television appearances, colleges, cruise ships and headlining clubs, he also found a girlfriend. Tyler's comedy CD was chosen by LaughSpin Magazine as the Best Comedy Album of 2012 and you may have seen him on such shows as Celebrity Name Game, Moms Rule, Nesn Comedy All Stars, or heard him on SIRIUS radio. Don't miss a chance to see Tyler live.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.desc: Helene brings honesty to the stage that helps everyone relax-- and laugh at the joys and pains of aging, being a married mother of two and all that the generation gap brings!

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.desc: Have you ever, as an adult, been bullied by a healthcare professional or popular middle school girl? Andrew has. The comedy of Andrew Hobbs encapsulates the bizarre awkwardness of belated maturity and his attempts to appear in control. Andrew will have you rolling with laughter as he twists a narrative of humor and heart from his own life experiences and observations. His comedy has been featured in comedy festivals across the country. He has been perfecting his craft since childhood and throughout adulthood.

programme.title: Ron Ruhman
programme.desc: Ron has been called a “High Energy Seinfeld”. He brings a very energetic style to the stage as he shares his interesting slant on day-to-day life in an act that is clean, smart, and very entertaining.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.desc: Paul was raised as a sports fanatic in the tiny town of Owego, in upstate New York. After four years of playing college basketball, somehow he graduated. Aside from playing in the NBA, his dream job was to talk about sports for a living. Paul then moved to California after landing a television sports anchor job but found out quickly that he was “too much of a smart-ass” for TV news. After he was fired, Paul took his unique sense of humor to comedy club stages all over the country. In 2005, Paul was selected to perform at the HBO Comedy Festival in Las Vegas. Morrissey has also been a finalist in several national comedy competitions including Wendy's Comedy Challenge, Comedy Central's Open Mic Fight and Maxim's Real Men of Comedy.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.sub-title: Jonnie W: Not My Cup of Tea
programme.desc: Jonnie W addresses the Tennessee-born stereotype. Whether or not he matches up to it, his voiced inner monologue is sure to leave you on his side when it comes to new country radio, double decker grave plots, and the difference between fish and beef.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.desc: Mike Burton delivers his comedy with high energy, great storytelling, and hilarious facial expressions. Mike started his stand-up comedy career in 1996 first performing in the local clubs in NYC, then gaining nationwide popularity. He has been on TV shows, independent feature films, and commercials for HP and Modells. Mike has also performed in daytime shows: Rachel Ray, The Chew, and ABC's The Revolution.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.desc: Half-Persian and raised in a religious family, K-Von's comedy unites sharp cultural riffs with clean delivery. In this special he takes on political correctness, cyber bullying, and the utility of cargo pants.

programme.desc: Jeff Dunham stars in this special from the world famous Dolby Theatre in Hollywood.

programme.title: Jeff Dunham Arguing with Myself
programme.desc: Jeff and his characters Walter, Peanut, Jos Jalapeo, Bubba J, and Sweet Daddy Dee for a live show.

programme.title: Larry the Cable Guy: Remain Seated
programme.desc: Larry the Cable Guy from the Blue Collar Comedy tour stars in his first solo stand-up special.

programme.title: Gallagher Overboard
programme.desc: Featuring Gallagher's most elaborate staging, and imaginative use of props, he really did go Overboard when he did this one.

programme.title: Fatimah Taliah: Nice To Meet Me
programme.desc: Fatimah Taliah talks about getting to know herself during the 2020 pandemic lockdown.

programme.title: Gary Owen Breakin' Out the Park
programme.desc: In this brutally honest stand-up performance Owen confesses his hilarious history of growing up in and around trailer parks.

programme.title: Atlantic Rim: Resurrection
programme.desc: Mech-bots, with even bigger and badder weapons than their predecessors, attempt to stop bio-mechanical monsters from descending on LA. But the monsters are strong too, leaving the pilots of the mech-bots scrambling to defeat the creatures.

programme.title: Almighty Thor
programme.desc: When the demon god Loki destroys the fortress of Valhalla and steals the Hammer of Invincibility, only the young hero Thor can protect Earth from armageddon.

programme.title: Troy: The Odyssey
programme.desc: In the aftermath of the Trojan War, Odysseus must face even greater peril, battling gods and monsters as he journeys home.

programme.title: AE Apocalypse Earth
programme.desc: A group of refugees from Earth land on an exotic planet, where they must fight ruthless aliens to survive.

programme.title: 2-Headed Shark Attack
programme.desc: When a Semester at Sea ship is sunk by a mutated two-headed shark, the survivors escape to a deserted atoll. But when it starts flooding, the coeds are no longer safe from the double jaws of the monster.

programme.title: Life of a King
programme.desc: An ex-felon on a path of redemption defies convention and establishes a Chess Club for inner-city teenagers.

programme.title: Hollow Creek
programme.desc: Trying to find inspiration for his next horror novel, Blake retreats to the Appalachian Mountains with his mistress, Angelica. When she disappears, Blake becomes a prime suspect.

programme.title: Mozart and the Whale
programme.desc: The budding romance between two people with Asperger's syndrome is threatened by their emotional dysfunctions.

programme.title: A Map of the World
programme.desc: A school nurse (Sigourney Weaver) faces the scorn of her community after an accident on her property.

programme.title: Kung Fu Yoga
programme.desc: An archaeology professor and his team must locate and save a lost treasure. With Jackie Chan. Subtitled.

programme.title: Police Story: Lockdown
programme.desc: While visiting his estranged daughter at a nightclub, a police captain (martial arts legend Jackie Chan) must spring into action when an elaborate kidnapping plan unravels right before his eyes. Subtitled.

programme.title: Post Impact
programme.desc: After a meteor strike starts a new ice age, a group of survivors try to find a device that could give mankind new hope. Featuring Dean Cain and Bettina Zimmermann.

programme.title: Kung Fu Yoga
programme.desc: An archaeology professor and his team must locate and save a lost treasure. With Jackie Chan. Subtitled.

programme.title: Wildfire
programme.desc: Nicola is a natural winemaker living in a remote village near Crotone, where his atavistic pursuit of wine is under active siege from climate related wildfires and the prolonged dry seasons. For Nicola, and other winemakers like him, this environmental change has existential consequences it threatens his livelihood. “Wildfire” patiently observes Nicola in this affective state of anxiety—as the wildfire grows within him—as he's forced to alter the course of his harvest in real time. Directed by Andree Ljutica.

programme.title: Jiro Dreams of Sushi
programme.desc: JIRO DREAMS OF SUSHI is the story of 85-year-old Jiro Ono, considered by many to be the world's greatest sushi chef. He is the proprietor of Sukiyabashi Jiro, a 10-seat, sushi-only restaurant inauspiciously located in a Tokyo subway station. Despite its humble appearances, it is the first restaurant of its kind to be awarded a prestigious three-star Michelin Guide rating. Directed by David Gelbb.

programme.title: The Wolfpack
programme.desc: THE WOLFPACK is a coming of age story following the six Angulo brothers who have spent their entire lives locked away from society in an apartment on the Lower East Side of Manhattan. All they know of the outside world is gleaned from the films they watch obsessively and recreate meticulously, using elaborate homemade props and costumes. For years this has served as a productive way to stave off loneliness – but when one of the brothers escapes, everything changes. Directed by Crystal Moselle.

programme.title: Blackfish
programme.desc: Killer whales are beloved, majestic, friendly giants, yet infamous for their capacity to kill viciously. BLACKFISH unravels the complexities of this dichotomy, employing the story of the notorious performing whale Tilikum, who — unlike any orca in the wild — has taken the lives of several people while in captivity. BLACKFISH expands on the discussion of keeping such intelligent creatures in captivity. Directed by Gabriela Cowperthwaite.

programme.title: Contemporary Color
programme.desc: In the summer of 2015, legendary musician David Byrne staged an event at Brooklyn's Barclays Center to celebrate the creativity of color guard: synchronized dance routines involving flags, rifles, and sabers, colloquially known as “the sport of the arts.” The result is CONTEMPORARY COLOR, a bold and irrepressible snapshot of a one-of-a-kind live experience. Directed by Bill Ross and Turner Ross.

programme.title: Odd Man Rush
programme.desc: When Harvard hockey's Bobby Sanders lands in Sweden's minor leagues, his relationship with the girl at the local market forces him to confront the reality of his childhood NHL dream before the Hockey Gods intervene.

programme.title: Love Spreads
programme.desc: Glass Hearts are blocked. What will it take to make that crucial second album?

programme.title: Remember Yesterday

programme.title: Guns N' Roses
programme.desc: With over 100 million albums sold, the world's most dangerous band returns for this historic Sin City takeover! Legendary Rock Band Guns N' Roses have taken the desert by storm and laid claim on Las Vegas' Hard Rock Casino. This absolute ambush on the city of sin, captured in High Definition, puts you in the best seat in the house for an electrifying once in a lifetime live concert performance. Filmed during GNR's Appetite For Democracy residency at The Joint in November 2012, celebrating twenty-five years of "Appetite for Destruction"and four years of "Chinese Democracy", in this elaborate Vegas style production featuring Rock Icon Axl Rose at the top of his game with his current lineup performing some of GNR's biggest hits including "Welcome To The Jungle", "Sweet Child Of Mine", "Mr Brownstone", "November Rain", "Chinese Democracy", "Knockin On Heaven's Door", "Nightrain", 'Civil War", McCartney's "Live And Let Die", "Paradise City", and many more hard rockin hits! This is the first live concert release from Guns N' Roses with it's newest lineup, since Use Your Illusion II in 1992 with GNR's original members. Sin City will never be the same.

programme.title: Fun'Q with Spencer Watts
programme.desc: The best grilled treats sometime come in bite sizes portions so Spencer is making grilled appetizers! It's a feast of flavours that begins with smoked beef meatballs in rich Bravas sauce. Then it's all about the seafood with his grilled mixed seafood salad with citrus wedges, crisp fennel and spinach. A platter of blue cheese stuffed dates, wrapped in bacon and charred on the grill served with blistered peppers, and toasted pine nuts is a feast for the eyes and belly. And, to finish the spread- Spencer makes a decadent grilled eggplant and Marguez lamb sausage pizza. Now that is some party food!

programme.title: Fun'Q with Spencer Watts
programme.desc: Spencer embraces the bounty of herbs available in the summer and makes lavender salted spatchcock chicken with a balsamic truffle glaze. Then he smokes salmon steaks on whiskey barrel planks and blankets them in a fresh rosemary and garlic oil. Pork tenderloins are hugged with prosciutto, pancetta and sage and infused with orange and then it's a grilled fingerling and yam potato salad with a creamy herb dressing. Fragrant and delicious, this is an herbalicious feast you don't want to miss.

programme.title: Fun'Q with Spencer Watts
programme.desc: A fiesta is a celebration and Spencer celebrates with some delicious grilled food! He starts with his cola marinated, fiesta spice rubbed pork ribs. Then he blows people away with his deep and rich shredded chicken mole and homemade masa tortillas. When it's hot out, a light and cool ceviche is refreshing and Spencer's comes with a spicy grilled habanero pineapple sauce that packs a punch. Last, Spencer shares the secrets to his decadent broiled tex Mex oysters. It's time to party!

programme.title: Comfort Food With Spencer Watts
programme.desc: The bounty of the fall means harvest time and that inspires Spencer to make black bean and kabocha squash soup with braised Swiss chard and chili pesto, as well as pumpkin gnudi smothered in a rich cream sauce.

programme.title: One World Kitchen
programme.desc: Surprisingly, Thais don't grill much at home, although they love to buy grilled food from street vendors. Thai chef Pailin Chongchitnant shows us how to grill up some delicious dishes, starting with yam makhaua yao, or grilled eggplant salad.

programme.title: One World Kitchen

One thing it's famous for is arancini, or those tasty little rice balls that are battered and deep-fried. programme.title: One World Kitchen
programme.desc: Bring on the seafood! Home cook Mary Tang kicks off this episode of One World Kitchen 3 with a unique dish featuring chewy clams, sweet and bitter fermented black beans, and a collection of spices. Next, she makes us her favourite shrimp dish - Shrimp and Egg Fried Rice. Fluffy egg bits, lightly flavoured nutty brown rice, and a pop of tender shrimp works wonders for the taste buds. A common appetizer, Mary then walks us through a spicy concoction of deep-fried salt and pepper squid or Calamari. And who doesn't love lobster? Mary finishes off with Cantonese Lobster with Ginger and Scallions (yes, it tastes as good as it sounds!). A Cantonese take on the juicy protein, this dish is fried in hot bubbling oil for a golden-brown crust, and steamed in great Shaoxing wine and salty soy sauce for some flavour.

programme.title: One World Kitchen
programme.desc: A tasty four-course Vietnamese meal using fruit? Yes, please! For her first dish, talented home cook Lisa Nguyen uses tangy tamarind pulp to balance flavours in a savoury bowl of Vietnamese Sour Fish Soup. Then, she combines tart pomelo and sweet pineapple with juicy crab meat for a flavourful salad. Next up, hot Chicken Coconut Curry with a hint of citrusy lemongrass, sweet potatoes, and a kaffir lime leaf. Pair it with a warm, toasty baguette and you're good to go! Lisa's last dish is a mouth-watering, classic Vietnamese dessert. Soft and chewy Steamed Banana Cake drizzled in a sweet velvety coconut sauce crunchy sesame seeds will have you begging for more!

programme.title: Journeys in Africa
programme.sub-title: Mombasa: The Center of it All
programme.desc: Gold, ivory and slaves drove the economy of the East coast of Africa 500 years ago. Join us as we explore the Portuguese and Arab roles in these horrific trade schemes. We'll also investigate the pristine waters off the coast of the nearby National Park where our host dons a snorkel mask and comes face-to-face with the creatures of the coral reef.

programme.title: Journeys in Africa
programme.sub-title: Arusha/Manyara: Hidden Wonders of the North
programme.desc: The Great Rift Valley is actually where the continent of Africa is literally tearing itself apart. It's a geologic phenomenon where one side is a rainforest full of colorful birds and strange monkeys and the other, a large lake centered on a vast plain. Two bordering eco-zones…double the wildlife.

programme.title: Journeys in Africa
programme.sub-title: Great Cities of Tanzania: Countdown to History
programme.desc: To this day sisal, a rope making fiber plant, is a mainstay of the economy. Journeys tours the capital city of Tanzania and its diverse religious institutions before heading into sisal country. We'll learn about the German influences and the seldom heard story of Livingstone's final trip across Africa.

programme.title: Journeys in Africa
programme.sub-title: Saadani National Park: The History The Land and The Sea
programme.desc: This is one of the few national parks in Africa where the bush meets the ocean. The big game of Africa face off with the creatures of the deep. Our host goes a little rogue for supper and tries his hand at surf netting prawns after spending a day looking for the elusive elephants of Saadani.

programme.title: Journeys in Africa
programme.sub-title: Mikumi National Park: Gateway to the Southern Circuit
programme.desc: If there ever was a lost wildlife gem, it would be Mikumi. Here many of the Big Twelve live their lives against the backdrop of one of the most scenic parks in Africa. Bill takes a break from the wildlife safari to investigate the huge salt works at the edge of the park and how it may impact future conservation.

programme.title: Jet Skis and Massages
programme.desc: First, the team heads to the beach to grab a little sun as well as two luxury jet skis. Then, Lou and Froy get in touch with their sensitive side when they confront a massage therapist who's as skilled with her hands as she is with her feet. And finally, Lou and Sonia are unknowingly hired to pull a prank on a debtor, which could cost everyone.

programme.title: Get That Prowler
programme.desc: First, Lou, Sonia, and Froy unfurl an elaborate sting when they repo a taxicab by tricking its driver into picking them up. But what to do with his ferociously inebriated client? Then, Matt and Froy attempt to repo a DeLorean from a debtor whose car isn't all that's stuck in the 80's. Finally, Lou and Sonia square off against an overgrown child who isn't giving up his Plymouth Prowler without a tussle.

programme.title: Up Up and Away
programme.desc: First, it's up, up, and away, for Lou, Froy, and Matt. All of their skills are tested when they attempt to take down not one, but two hot air balloons. Then, Lou and Froy find themselves in the wrong part of town, repo'ing a sports car from a former gang member who's not afraid to go back to jail. Finally, Lou and Lyndah break in Frankie, the new guy, with a repo that turns into a confrontation with three spray-paint-packing graffiti girls.

programme.title: Family Drama
programme.desc: First, Lou, Froy, and Matt team up with Eva, an alluring lending agent, who sets up a sting to repo a limousine from its delinquent owner.

programme.title: Kegger and Refrigerator
programme.desc: First, Lyndah has some tension with Frankie when they repo a truck from a moving company in the middle of relocating some fragile material for a very important client. Then, Froy, Sonia, and Frankie crash a raging kegger in a bad part of town and have to contend with a gaggle of irate partiers in order to secure their target vehicle. Finally, Lou and Matt find themselves in one of the worst situations imaginable when they realize that the car they're trying to repo has been fitted with what seems to be an explosive device.

programme.title: Going Green and Falling Down
programme.desc: First, Sonia and Froy arrive on the scene to a repo a car that's been refitted to run on biodiesel and are shocked to see that its owner shares some of Sonia's features.

programme.title: Look What You Did!
programme.desc: First, Sonia and Froy get locked in the battle of a lifetime with a pair of young debtors who are understandably upset that their late model Tahoe has found its way to the bottom of a lake. Is it Froy's fault, as they claim, or are there other forces at work here? Then, Lou and Matt get down and dirty with a taser-packing P.I. who isn't ready to say goodbye to his ride. Finally, when Frankie puts the go-jacks on the wrong car, it plucks Matt's last nerve and places him at risk for the beat-down of the century.

programme.title: That's Disrespectful
programme.desc: First, Sonia and Lyndah are faced with a choice. Do they attempt to reclaim a burnt-out husk of a car from its high-flying owners, or do they just give up and go home?

programme.title: Smoke, Lead, and Alcohol
programme.desc: First, Matt and Froy venture into one of the city's most dangerous neighborhoods, only to find a debtor ready to defend his ride by pumping it full of lead, with no concern for who gets caught in the crossfire.

programme.title: Missed Dates
programme.desc: First, Lyndah is put in a tough situation - she has to control a sobbing, cop-calling debtor and turn away Frankie's unwanted and inappropriate advances - all at the same time. Then, Matt and Froy have two problems on their hands, when they decide to haul away both a stripped-down husk of a car and the phone number of its owner's coquettish and bathrobe-wearing ex-girlfriend. Finally, Lou, Froy, and Lyndah head way out into the country to wrangle with a case of mistaken identity and a trio of shotgun-wielding cultists.

programme.title: Broken Tooth Lou and Bad Breath Frankie
programme.desc: First, Froy and Lyndah probably need to schedule a trip to the dentist after Lou's tooth gets knocked out in the course of a tense confrontation with two irate debtors. Then, Frankie seriously blows a routine voluntary repo when the owner smells something on his breath. With Lou racing to the scene, is this the end of the road for the new guy? Then, Lou's problems get even worse when a rampaging construction crew employs an excavator to demolish the target Camry - with Froy inside of it.

programme.title: Matt Vs. Giant Chicken
programme.desc: First, Matt and Froy cope with the uncertainty of Lou's condition by liberating a Vespa from a leather-clad biker and his rabble-rousing girlfriend. Then, Matt and Froy head out again to claim a Toyota Yaris from a truant children's entertainer wearing an unexpected outfit. And finally, the whole team heads out to repo more than six cars from an insolvent dealership, with the fate of their leader still in question.

programme.title: Segway This Way
programme.desc: First, Matt and Sonia hit the beach to repossess an old-fashioned classic surfer car from an old-fashioned surfer looking for a classic tussle. Then, Froy and Matt stretch their wits to identify and take down an uncooperative Segway renter. Hopefully, one of them knows how to ride that thing. And finally, Lou, Lyndah, and Froy crash a house-party to claim a Civic from an out-of-control wannabe gangster.

programme.title: The Canals of Deceit
programme.desc: First, Sonia and Froy get messy when they head to Venice Beach to track down and recover a canoe from the world-famous canals. Then, Lyndah and Sonia confront a distraught widow with a terrible secret. And finally, there's no time-out for Lou and Matt when a posse of soccer players get physical to protect their precious and unpaid-for Camaro

programme.title: The Mind Shift
programme.desc: Help your mind stay focused on maintaining and supporting better mental health. 1) Tips for reclaiming your peace of mind online | Naomi Shimada 2) How to enter flow state | TED-Ed 3) The business case for working with your toughest critics | Bob Langert 4) The mental health benefits of storytelling for health care workers | Laurel Braitman 5) What role does luck play in your life? | Barry Schwartz

programme.title: Best of the Best
programme.desc: Our best, most popular TED content over the years. 1) We're building a dystopia just to make people click on ads | Zeynep Tufekci 2) How technology changes our sense of right and wrong | Juan Enriquez 3) How technology can fight extremism and online harassment | Yasmin Green 4) How NASA invented a ventilator for COVID-19 ... in 37 days | Dan Goods

programme.title: The Creative Zone
programme.desc: What makes us create and innovate? Here, wildly creative thinkers share ideas and insights into what kindles genius. 1) How I accidentally changed the way movies get made | Franklin Leonard 2) What makes a hero? - Matthew Winkler 3) Stunning buildings made from raw, imperfect materials | Débora Mesa Molina 4) Creative ways to get kids to thrive in school | Olympia Della Flora 5) Why is this black square famous? | Allison Leigh

programme.title: Legends of Design
programme.desc: Some of history's greatest designers share intriguing perspectives and vignettes from their prolific journeys. 1) Inside the massive (and unregulated) world of surveillance tech | Sharon Weinberger 2) How do jetpacks work? And why don't we all have them? | Richard Browning 3) The sustainable brilliance of Indigenous design | Manu Peni 4) How do you build a sacred space? | Siamak Hariri 5) Why do beavers build dams? | Glynnis Hood 6) Autofocusing reading glasses of the future | Nitish Padmanaban

programme.title: The Curious Traveler
programme.desc: Traveling to new destinations is always an experience. Insights and encouragement for you to think differently about the places you visit and the people you see. 1) The joy of surfing in ice-cold water | Chris Burkard 2) The largest river on Earth is actually in the sky | Iseult Gillespie 3) Gorgeous portraits of the world's vanishing people | Jimmy Nelson 4) A brief history of dumplings | Miranda Brown 5) 3 ways to make flying more climate-friendly | Ryah Whalen 6) What really happened to the Library of Alexandria? | Elizabeth Cox

programme.title: Climate Action, Now!
programme.desc: Get inspired to save the world with these dedicated minds and leaders tackling one of the biggest threats against modern civilization: climate change. 1) What the fossil fuel industry doesn't want you to know | Al Gore 2) An extreme weather report from America's weatherman | Al Roker 3) The wildly complex anatomy of a sneaker 4) A new social contract for global climate justice | Huma Yusuf
